title: CreRaces Legacy [Archived]
description: Welcome to CreRaces Legacy, this is a downscaled version of CreRaces to more resemble how the mod used to be before! (It's based on CreRaces b1.4.2 trying to replicate a1.0.6 but with a lot of features and races removed)
body:
Main page on CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creraces-legacy

Remember Pehkui is required for the mod to work correctly.

CreRaces, CreRaces Classic and CreRaces Legacy are NOT meant to run together but they are somewhat interchangeable!

Ever wanted to be more then just a human?

Welcome to CreRaces Legacy, this is a downscaled version of CreRaces to more resemble how the mod used to be before! (It's based on CreRaces b1.4.2 trying to replicate a1.0.6 but with a lot of features and races removed)

The Race Selection Crystal is used to change race if you didin't like the race you selected on-startup but remember that it won't work if you've already selected a race so make sure to use The Race Reset Crystal before you can use it. (Creative Only)

Join the Discord Server! https://discord.gg/QagkwvSWtC

 

Active polls:

none

 

These are the different races as of 1.2:

  + Undead

  + Dwarf

  + Dragonborn

  + Valkyrie

  + Fairy

  + Mermaid

  + Elementalist

  + Android

  + Dryad

The different races abilities and purposes are only displayed in-game at the moment.

Just a thing I should mention, most of the assets and even some textures are placeholders and should not represent the final product!

And tips on what to maybe change or add to races is always appreciated!

 

Made by: mc_jojo3
